commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
Adds an offline native Telegram for macOS Postbox importer with detection/probe metadata, docs, Docker/deps updates, and crawlkit privacy metadata.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug report, but the PR defect is source-reproducible: `runImport` registers `--path`, not `--source`, after the `import` subcommand. I did not run the importer against private Telegram data.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the invalid README command without changing the importer design.

target.title: [codex] import Telegram macOS Postbox archives
target.body:
# Human written summary:
The intent of this change is, as written by a human:
> how can we fix telecrawl to get all our messgeas out, thats basically the goal here. telegram is key.

_The rest of this PR was written by GPT-5-Codex, running in the Codex desktop harness. Full environment + prompt history appear at the end._

# Changes
- Adds an offline native Telegram for macOS Postbox importer for `.tempkeyEncrypted` plus `account-*/postbox/db/db_sqlite`.
- Auto-detects Telegram Desktop `tdata` first, then the Keepcoder group container, and routes explicit Postbox paths to the new importer.
- Reports Postbox key/database counts in `doctor` and advertises the `telegram-macos-postbox` local-only scope in crawlkit metadata.
- Updates docs, changelog, and packaged Python dependencies for SQLCipher/Postbox imports.

# Tests
- `nix shell nixpkgs#go_1_26 -c go test ./...` passed.
- `python -B -m py_compile internal/telegramdesktop/scripts/import_postbox.py` passed under Nix Python with `pycryptodomex` and `sqlcipher3`.
- End-to-end temp DB import from copied Keepcoder data passed: `doctor` reported 2 key files and 2 Postbox DBs; `import` wrote 48,980 messages, 358 chats, and 9,919 media-tagged messages; `status` reported oldest `2015-01-25T11:29:57Z` and newest `2026-05-28T16:31:11Z`.
- Raw decrypted Postbox `t7` key sanity check matched the import count: 48,980 unique local messages from 2015 through 2026.
- `telecrawl --json metadata` includes `telegram-macos-postbox` in local-only privacy scopes.

# Risks
- Postbox parsing is local-cache best effort. It imports text, peer names where locally decodable, timestamps, direction, sender IDs, and media tag categories, but not full Telegram cloud metadata parity with the Telethon `tdata` path.
- SQLCipher availability matters for Postbox imports; Docker and `deps install` now include the needed Python/native dependencies.
- One existing open PR also touches `internal/cli/cli.go` and `internal/telegramdesktop/importer.go`, so one branch may need a small rebase depending on merge order.

# Follow-ups
- Add sanitized Postbox fixtures if a non-private sample can be produced.
- Extend Postbox media cache extraction beyond media tag categories.
- Reconcile with single-chat import filtering after the existing import-filter PR lands.

# Prompt History

## Environment
Harness: Codex desktop app
Model: GPT-5 Codex
Thinking level: not exposed by harness
Terminal: zsh
System: Darwin 25.5.0 arm64

## Prompts
| ISO-8601 | Prompt |
| --- | --- |
| 2026-05-28T21:41:23+02:00 | `[openclaw/telecrawl](https://github.com/openclaw/telecrawl) -> check this project out. we have some work going on in gogcrawl, i wanna do something similar - basically get all my telegram data out. same with https://openclaw.ai/ecosystem -> see if we can get other messaging apps out, imessage, whatsapp, signal, etc. lets figure out easy ones first then tackle hard ones later` |
| 2026-05-28T21:41:23+02:00 | `feel free to upgrade shit if needed btw` |
| 2026-05-28T21:41:23+02:00 | `do NOT do anything that requires interacting directly with messaging apps tho (like sending messages for a 2fa flow) thats unacceptable.` |
| 2026-05-28T21:41:23+02:00 | `no homebrew. homebrew is unacceptable. use nix devenvs` |
| 2026-05-28T21:41:23+02:00 | `USE A DEVENV OR BUILD FROM SOURCE` |
| 2026-05-28T21:41:23+02:00 | `ok lets dive in on telegram. do we have a working folder? overall goal is to start building data on each of these messaging surfaces, and integrate with like crawlbar and crawlkit. what did they do with telegram? did they build it against a different version of the mac app? the app store one or whatever? how can we fix telecrawl to get all our messgeas out, thats basically the goal here. set it as a goal. telegram is key.` |
| 2026-05-28T21:41:23+02:00 | `we need to sanity check against telegram too - ideally it should go back as early as i ever used telegram, which is like........ 2012 maybe? 2014? need to check it` |
target.author: joshp123

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
